snippet.title: LIVE: Reuters Editor-in-Chief Alessandra Galloni speaks with Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla
snippet.description:
Pfizer, one of the world’s largest pharmaceutical companies, is coming off two years of enormous success as the world’s largest supplier of COVID vaccines and the most successful anti-viral therapeutic on the market.

Reuters Editor-in-Chief Alessandra Galloni discusses Pfizer’s next era with Bourla, as the company turns to launching new treatments while balancing the world’s call for better access to medicines with its promise of profits for shareholders.

#Live #News #Reuters #ReutersNewsmaker #Pfizer

snippet.title: Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla Talks Post-Covid Transition | Bloomberg Talks
snippet.description:
Pfizer's sales missed estimates for the quarter as the drugmaker tries to transition out of the pandemic. Pfizer chairman and CEO Albert Bourla discusses the path ahead for the company, including its plans for acquisitions. He speaks with Bloomberg Wall Street Week host David Westin.

snippet.title: #Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla Davos '23 Interview | #RebelNewsClips @RebelNewsOnline
snippet.description:
Why is Albert Bourla STILL refusing to answer the questions posed by members of the EU Parliament?

DISCLAIMER: I am not stealing content. This needs to be seen and its already being suppressed. I don't do this for money. I don't want your money.
This is what's called a 'repost'. Look at the comments for source.

Rebel News reporters Ezra Levant and Avi Yemini found Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla on the streets of Davos and asked him some questions. The best and only answer he could give was "Have a nice day".
What was in those SMS text messages Al was sending back in forth to Ursula Von der Leyen, Chair of the EU Commission? What is he hiding? What is he hiding FROM? Lots of questions and very few answers.

"Stress" by Justice

snippet.title: IFPMA event at UNGA 78: Intervention from Albert Bourla
snippet.description:
How can innovation be at the heart of our plans to strengthen global health security?

With a focus on three global health topics – pandemic prevention, preparedness and response, universal health coverage, and tuberculosis – at UNGA78, IFPMA hosted a side event featuring insights from leading figures who are at the center of steps to deliver innovation for global health security.

This in-person event brought together senior representatives from governments, multilateral organizations, and the private sector.

snippet.title: Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla discusses new vaccines in the pipeline
snippet.description: Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla speaks with CNBC's Sara Eisen at the World Economic Forum in Davos about China's fight against Covid, new vaccines Pfizer is developing (including ones for RSV, Lyme's disease) and the state of big pharma competition.

snippet.title: Distinguished Speakers Series: Dr. Albert Bourla, Pfizer
snippet.description:
Pfizer CEO Dr. Albert Bourla spoke with Fuqua School of Business Dean Bill Boulding on January 31, 2023. The talk was part of the school’s Distinguished Speakers Series.

More information about the series can be found at https://www.fuqua.duke.edu/dss

00:00 Intro
01:12 Veterinary medicine background
02:28 What was your biggest challenge in taking more business responsibilites, beyond just veterinary medicine?
06:54 How did living in different countries and cities teach you how to draw people together and bring out their best?
09:27 What challenges did you face in creating an inclusive work environment at Pfizer?
13:12 Can you explain why virtual work was sucessful during the pandemic, but now you want workers back in the office more often?
17:51 Did it create wear and tear on Pfizer employees to hear misinformation about COVID vaccines?
23:49 What can we do to combat disinformation?
24:49 Has Pfizer devoted extra resources to fight againt disinformation?
26:23 Has it shocked you to see the role of public health become politicized?
28:16 Regarding COVID vaccines, what was most critical in your ability to successfully partner with governments around the world?
30:36 How does it impact Pfizer if the U.S. government mandates a single common standard for a vaccine?
32:32 How will you navigate pricing when U.S. ends the pandemic emergency conditions?
34:37 Pharma pricing restrictions and the Inflation Reduction Act.
38:09 How do you make people understand that Pfizer is more than just a "COVID" company?
40:30 What promise does messenger RNA technology have for Pfizer?
42:27 Describe the challenge of knowing when to weigh in on social issues.
45:28 Tell us about Pfizer's commitment to ESG, for example sustainability bonds.
48:46 What advice would you give to your younger self?
51:07 What advice do you have for students? What has gotten you where you are today?
53:32 Conclusion

snippet.title: Albert Bourla annonce à MSNBC que Pfizer va sortir 19 vaccins !
snippet.description: Alors que Bourla refusait de répondre aux questions des vrais journalistes de Rebel News, il fait de la publicité à Davos sur MSNBC pour ses futurs injections, la journaliste ne pose aucune question dérangeante et félicite pour sa nouvelle invention : le "vaccin maternelle" qui se transmet de la mère vacciné au lait pour vacciner son bébé. Ils sont horribles et personne pour arrêter leurs folies ?

snippet.description:
#bourla #covid #pfizer 
Grazie per aver guardato il mio video. Se ti e' piaciuto iscriviti al Canale.
Thank you for watching. If you liked subscribe to the Channel.


Il 2 febbraio 2023 il Dr. Albert Bourla si è rivolto all'Economic Club di Chicago, di fronte a un pubblico dal vivo. Dopo le sue osservazioni, ha partecipato a una conversazione con il presidente dello Spelman College, la dott.ssa Helene D. Gayle, in cui hanno discusso del processo di sviluppo del vaççino C0VID-19, del futuro dell'assistenza sanitaria, delle maggiori aspettative dei leader aziendali e altro ancora.

snippet.title: Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla Relies On Aggressive Security Tactics To Escape Questioning By Veritas
snippet.description:
Donate: https://www.projectveritas.com/donate

Get emails: https://confirmsubscription.com/h/j/EC8A17570A033FCC

Follow:
Telegram: https://t.me/project_veritas
FB: https://www.facebook.com/ProjectVeritas
IG: https://www.instagram.com/project_veritas/
Telegram: https://t.me/JamesOKeefeIII
IG: https://www.instagram.com/jamesokeefeiii/

Mission Statement
Investigate & expose corruption, dishonesty, self-dealing, waste, fraud, and other misconduct in both public and private institutions in order to achieve a more ethical & transparent society.

Core Values
MORAL COURAGE - Courage is the virtue that sustains all others. We choose to overcome our fears.

WE ARE ALL LEADERS - Turning people into leaders. Completed staff work. Ownership.

COLLABORATION - Best not to work in silos. No one individual is as smart as all of us.

RESILIENCE - Persistence and determination alone are omnipotent. Never, ever, ever give up. We don't let mistakes or setbacks discourage us. Pursue perfection, knowing full well you will never attain it.

MISSION DRIVEN - The best people are motivated by purpose. We are passionate and truly believe in our cause. We must be externally focused, not internally focused.

MAKE THE STATUS QUO DO THE IMPOSSIBLE - We move mountains. Failure is not an option. We do whatever it takes.

THE TIP OF THE SPEAR - We are a loss leader. We do not shy away from conflict or litigation.

Ethical Values
Rule #1 – Truth is paramount. Our reporting is fact based with clear and irrefutable video and audio content.  Truth is paramount. We never deceive our audience. We do not distort the facts or the context. We do not “selectively edit.”

Rule #2 – We do not break the law. We maintain one-party consent when recording someone is inherently moral and ethical. We never record when there is zero-party consent. In areas where we are required to have consent from all parties, we seek legal guidance regarding the expectation of privacy’s impact on our right to record.

Rule #3 – We adhere to the 1st Amendment rights of others. During our investigations we do not disrupt the peace. We do not infringe on the 1st Amendment rights of others.

Rule #4 – The Zekman Test. The undercover investigations we pursue are judged by us to be of “vital public interest” and “profound importance.” The Zekman Test is our baseline. Undercover investigative reporting is necessary because, “...there’s no other way to get the story...” Whereas the Society of Professional Journalists allows for undercover techniques, if undercover techniques are necessary to expose issues of vital public importance; we believe they are not only allowed but required.

Rule #5 – We Protect the Innocent When Possible - Embarrassing private details are not to be investigated. We stay away from irrelevant embarrassingly intimate details about private citizens personal lives. We look for individual wrong-doing and judge its public importance. The irrelevant religious or sexual dispositions of our targets are not to be investigated.

Rule #6 – Transparency. Our methods & tactics must be reasonable and defensible. We use the “Twelve Jurors on Our Shoulder” rule. The work has to be done with such a degree of integrity that it can withstand scrutiny in both law & ethics. We are comfortable with transparency. We must be willing to be ready to disclose our methods upon publication.

Rule #7 – Verifying and Corroborate Stories – Evaluate impact on third parties and Newsworthiness of Statements Alone.We consistently consider the probable truth or falsity of statements, examine any reasons to doubt the veracity of underlying assertions and whether the assertions are newsworthy. When possible, we will confirm with our subjects that their statements captured on video are accurate & truthful. At the very least, we will give our subjects an opportunity to elaborate and/or respond. In all matters, we rely on the 1st Amendment to protect our ability to publish newsworthy items after our internal deliberations. On whether there is an obligation to ensure the veracity of statements made on video, 1.) consider whether the remarks may potentially impact an innocent third party. (Factors in support of releasing the content) and 2.)The Newsworthiness of the statement alone by itself. (Factors against releasing the content).

Rule #8 – Raw Video. In certain circumstances we may release the “raw” video to the press and or the public.  But as a rule, we do not.

Rule #9 – Subject Anonymity. We investigate & question sources before promising anonymity. Once we confirm, we will do everything in our power to protect the identity of our confidential sources.

Rule #10 – Being Accountable. Admit mistakes & correct them promptly.

Rule #11 – We do not manufacture content. We do not put words in our investigative subjects' mouths. We do not lead the horse to water. Our purpose is to elicit truth.

Rule #12 – With Great Power comes Great Responsibility.

localized.title: Δημοσιογράφοι στο Davos "στρίμωξαν" τον Albert Bourla - PFIZER'S CEO

snippet.title: Davos 2022 - Klaus Schwab et Albert Bourla riaient au sujet des rumeurs d'arrestation les concernant
snippet.description:
La réalité serait-elle en train de rattraper la fiction ?

Au sommet de Davos 2022, le fondateur du Forum économique mondial Klaus Schwab et le PDG de Pfizer Albert Bourla discutaient des théories de type Qanon les ciblant.

Ils évoquaient en particulier des publications massivement relayées affirmant que Bourla et le Pape avaient été arrêtés par le FBI.

Ces rumeurs relayées sans aucun élément de preuve servent très bien leur objectif : mettre les vérités dérangeantes portées par les « antivax/complotistes » au même niveau que les absurdités type arrestations qui se révèleront fausses, pour ainsi décrédibiliser l'ensemble.
